heroTextNews: Explore the latest stories from WAE. From product innovations and sustainability initiatives to industry insights, partnerships, and company milestones, browse through the updates below to discover what's shaping our journey and the future of water.
heroTextAwards: Every recognition tells a story of innovation, purpose, and progress. Explore the awards and honours that celebrate our commitment to engineering excellence, sustainable impact, thoughtful design, and redefining the future of water through meaningful innovation.

items.description: In an exclusive conversation with Priyal Dutta, Senior Correspondent, Safari India, Ms. Binita Singh, Head – Brand Advocacy at WAE F&B, shares her perspective on the evolving sustainability landscape in the...

items.title: 2026 Outlook: ESG, sustainability and the next phase of India’s water infrastructure
items.description: As India accelerates toward its developmental inflection point in the mid-2020s, water infrastructure and sustainability frameworks stand at the nexus of economic resilience, climate adaptation, and corporate governance imperatives.

items.title: From activism to infrastructure: How WAE is attempting to cut India’s plastic bottle use
items.description: Most people would rarely consider how a disposable plastic bottle of mineral water comes into being and what its long-term consequences are. It was against this context that Anupam Joshi founded WAE Water (WAE) as "an activist venture" almost 15 years ago.

items.title: WAE Felicitated with 15th CII Design Excellence Award 2025 for Communication Design
items.description: New Delhi, December 03, 2025: WAE, India’s leading water solutions provider, has been conferred the prestigious 15th CII Design Excellence Award 2025, securing a place among India’s Top 50 Designs  in the communication design category.

items.title: WAE Achieves Prestigious ZED Gold Certification for Manufacturing Excellence and Sustainability Leadership
items.description: New Delhi, 03rd Nov, 2025: WAE, India’s leading sustainable water solutions company, has been awarded the ZED Gold Certification by the Ministry of Micro, Small & Medium Enterprises (MSME), Government of India — a recognition of its world-class manufacturing practices, sustainability commitment, and continuous pursuit of excellence.

items.title: WAE Earns EcoVadis “Committed” Badge, Launching a Structured Journey Towards Platinum Sustainability Certification
items.description: New Delhi [India], February 26: WAE, India’s leading sustainable hydration solutions provider for institutional and commercial environments, today announced that it has been awarded the EcoVadis “Committed” Badge, a globally recognized sustainability acknowledgment by EcoVadis.

items.title: WAE Drinking Water Coolers Certified by BIS Under IS 1475:2024
items.description: WAE, an Indian manufacturer of drinking water and water management systems for institutional and commercial use, has received certification from the Bureau of Indian Standards (BIS) for its full range of drinking water coolers in accordance with IS 1475:2024. The certification covers all WAE drinking water cooler models with rated capacities above 10 litres per hour up to 150 litres per hour.
